title: Ezra's Colorful Peek-a-Boo
synopsis: Baby Ezra discovers different colored objects hidden around his home, playing peek-a-boo with red apples, yellow bananas, blue blocks, and green leaves while his diverse family joins in the fun.

illustration.description: Smiling baby Ezra with warm brown skin and curly dark hair sits on a soft cream blanket, covering his eyes with chubby hands in peek-a-boo position. His grandmother with silver hair and gentle smile sits nearby. The room has soft pastel walls with high contrast red objects barely visible behind furniture.
illustration.alt: Baby Ezra playing peek-a-boo with his grandmother

illustration.description: Bright red apples spill from a woven basket on a sunny kitchen counter. Ezra claps his hands excitedly while his father, a tall man with dark skin and warm eyes, holds a shiny red apple. The kitchen background is soft cream with pops of red throughout.
illustration.alt: Ezra and his father discovering red apples

illustration.description: Ezra's hands cover his eyes again while sitting in his high chair. His mother with long black hair and olive skin peeks around the corner holding something yellow behind her back. The dining room has warm peach walls with yellow sunlight streaming through windows.
illustration.alt: Ezra playing peek-a-boo waiting for yellow surprise

illustration.description: Bright yellow bananas arranged on Ezra's high chair tray. His mother helps him touch the soft banana pieces. Ezra's face shows pure joy with wide dark eyes and an open-mouthed smile. The scene is bathed in warm yellow sunlight.
illustration.alt: Ezra exploring yellow bananas with his mother

illustration.description: Ezra sits on a soft rug covering his eyes with tiny fists. His older sister with curly hair in colorful braids hides blue blocks behind a pastel blue cushion. The living room has cream walls with blue accents and toys scattered about.
illustration.alt: Ezra's sister hiding blue blocks for peek-a-boo

illustration.description: Bright blue wooden blocks scattered on the rug as Ezra and his sister stack them together. Ezra reaches for a blue block with determination while his sister guides his hands. The scene has high contrast blue against the neutral background.
illustration.alt: Ezra and sister playing with blue blocks

illustration.description: Ezra sits by the window with his hands over his eyes. Outside the window, lush green leaves flutter on tree branches. His grandfather with gray beard and kind eyes points toward the window where green leaves dance in the breeze.
illustration.alt: Ezra and grandfather looking for green by the window

illustration.description: Vibrant green leaves fill the frame as Ezra and his grandfather look out the window together. The leaves show various shades of green with soft watercolor edges. Ezra points excitedly at the swaying leaves while grandfather holds him securely.
illustration.alt: Ezra discovering green leaves with grandfather

illustration.description: All family members surround Ezra in a warm group hug - mother, father, grandmother, grandfather, and sister. Red apples, yellow bananas, blue blocks, and green leaves are visible around them. Everyone has joyful expressions in this celebration of colors and family.
illustration.alt: Ezra's whole diverse family celebrating together with all the colors

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What color are the apples Ezra finds?
questions.explanation: The apples are red! Ezra discovers bright red apples with his father.

questions.question: What sound do the blocks make?
questions.explanation: The blue blocks make a 'stack, stack' sound when Ezra builds with them.

questions.question: Who helps Ezra find the green leaves?
questions.explanation: Ezra's grandfather points to the green leaves outside the window.
